blocks.content:
**What you'll learn:** A quick tour of what’s new and better in Grafana 13. It all runs on Play, so you don’t need your own stack to follow along.

Each stop jumps you to a real example, where you can open it, click around, and see how the feature behaves in an actual UI.
Curious to see how our Business Intelligence dashboards are enhanced by a semantic layer in Grafana? Check out the interactive guide!
Grafana SQL expressions let you use SQL to query and transform panel query results on the server after those queries run, and before the panel renders.

**SQL Expressions Showcase** — Open this dashboard to try SQL expressions hands-on. Edit a panel with 'SQL:' on its title, go to the **Queries** tab, and change the SQL expression. Refresh and see how the results change.

Grafana has revamped the **Gauge** and **Table** visualizations so dashboards look sharper and tell a clearer story. The new gauge adds a new **Circular** style, with built-in sparklines, gradients, and accessibility improvements such as **Center glow**. 

The table visualization, which comes with performance improvements, has new cell types: **Pill** and **Markdown + HTML** cells. 

Read [Revamped gauge visualization](https://grafana.com/whats-new/2026-01-19-revamped-gauge-visualization/) and [New table visualization is generally available](https://grafana.com/whats-new/2025-09-05-new-table-visualization-is-generally-available/) for the full rundown.
**Gauges** — Open this dashboard to try the new and improve **Gauge** visualization. Edit a panel and modify the options, and watch the gauge update in real time!
**Table** — Open this dashboard to explore the table visualization. Edit a panel and try out features such as frozen columns, and new cell types: **Pill** and **Markdown + HTML**.

Visualization Suggestions have been updated to provide more relevant suggestions and are now the default method for selecting a panel visualization.

When you preview a visualization using the updated Suggestions feature, we give you a full-sized preview of the suggestion in the panel editor before you select the suggestion.
**London Transport TFL** — Open this dashboard, then follow the interactive steps below to try the new and improved visualization suggestions.
Click the **Change** button to select a different visualization type.
Select one of the suggested visualizations and see your visualization update!
